name: Coronal Hypershunt
description: This class of megastructure once powered the unfathomable industrial might of the Domain, putting the human civilization well toward Kardashev type II status. It is capable of extracting energy on an astronomical scale directly from the linked star. Losing control of an active coronal hypershunt without following proper shut-down procedures can prove disastrous.

name: Nidavelir Complex
description: Originally built to meet the intense demands of the Domain, its unmatched production capabilities enable the rapid assembly of powerful fleets—granting a decisive advantage to whoever controls it.

name: Bifrost Network
description: Over 200 cycles after the Collapse, the Bifrost Network is a fragile echo of the Domain’s gate system—smaller, less reliable, and limited in reach. Yet it still connects scattered systems, serving as a vital lifeline and a faint reminder of humanity’s former greatness.

name: Pluto Mining Station
description: This class of mining station was once the crown jewel of the Domain's mining industry, using its massive mining array to efficiently extract resources from the neighboring planet and refine them on-site, providing Domain-grade materials on a scale unfathomably superior to planetary operations. However, improper use of its lasers or neglection of safety protocols could lead to catastrophic planetary damage.
